titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs, Yale University, Records
Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 12, 2019 at 07:30
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, committee records, fellowship applications, forms, and reports documenting the activities of the Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs at Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 9-E (YRG 9-E), Records documenting Yale College offices, programs, and projects

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs, Yale University, Records (RU 412). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, committee records, fellowship applications, forms, and reports documenting the activities of the Office of International Education and Fellowship Programs at Yale

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.
